claim_text: In Gemini 3.1 P1, M3 had higher evaluator-assessed technical plausibility than matched M1 under both LLM evaluators.

claim_text: In Gemini 3.1 P1, directional audits rated creative-core preservation near 4/5, practical MVP improvement >4.27/5, and overclaim removal >4/5.
Under role-aware directional audit, transformations were selected for prototyping more often than references.
boundary_condition: Not a neutral A/B preference result.

claim_text: Gemini 2.5 P0/P1 provide developmental/supplementary evidence of similar practicalization patterns.
Neutral paired tables establish M3 efficacy/equivalence/preference.

claim_text: CHVD improves market success, user adoption, real technical feasibility, or human preference.
